data.body:
---

After her sister died, she stayed.

She was only supposed to help him grieve.

The house was supposed to empty.

Instead, it learned how to breathe again.

Dinner for two.

Silence that didn’t feel empty.

A hand that stayed a second too long.

payhip.com/b/F86wq
